nasb.text: While all the country was weeping with a loud voice, all the people passed over. The king also passed over the brook Kidron, and all the people passed over toward the way of the wilderness.

esv.text: And all the land wept aloud as all the people passed by, and the king crossed the brook Kidron, and all the people passed on toward the wilderness.

cnv.text: 眾人向前走的時候，遍地的人都放聲大哭；王過了汲淪溪，眾人就都走上通往曠野去的路。

ccb.text: 众人离开时，百姓都放声大哭。王带着所有的人过了汲沦溪，向旷野走去。
